name: Roller
author: Poki
description: Roller is a colorful puzzle game where you swipe to move and restore life to a barren world. After a massive asteroid hit, help Pinky the dino roll across gray landscapes, bringing color back with every block you touch. Solve 60 mind-bending levels filled with twists and turns. Can you paint the world vibrant again? How do I play Roller? Roll around using the WASD, arrow keys, or dragging with your mouse, and make sure that there is no block left without color! Who created Roller? Roller is created by Fancade. Play their other games on Poki: Dino Bros , Drive Mad , Gobble , Longcat , Mekorama , Monster Match , Monster Tracks , Odd Bot Out , Pool , Recoil , Roper , Speed King , Stacktris , and Wall of Doom ! How can I play Roller for free? You can play Roller for free on Poki. Can I play Roller on mobile devices and desktop? Roller can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
